component.name: TextField
component.description: A labelled text input for collecting single-line user data. Includes a visible label, an optional error message with ARIA association, and interaction states. Use for any freeform text entry: names, emails, passwords, search terms.
component.figmaNodeId: none — no Figma component set exists; uses text styles only

when: Collecting freeform single-line text from the user (name, email, password, search query)
A form field needs a visible label and optional error feedback
The value is typed, not selected — use Select for predefined option sets

patterns.name: inline-name-row
patterns.description: Two TextFields side by side for first/last name — each wrapped in a Box with flex:1 so they share the available width equally.
patterns.tree: Inline(gap=md, align=start) > [Box(style={flex:1}) > TextField(label='First name'), Box(style={flex:1}) > TextField(label='Last name')]

patterns.name: form-field-stack
patterns.description: A vertical series of labelled fields inside a Card, grouped by topic.

antiPatterns.reason: Renders a single-line <input>; tall freeform content (bio, comments) needs a <textarea>.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a native <textarea> styled with design tokens until a TextArea component is added.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using TextField for choosing from a fixed list
antiPatterns.reason: Freeform text provides no validation or keyboard-navigable option list.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Select when the options are known and finite.

antiPatterns.reason: The label is required for accessibility — screen readers need it to describe the field.
antiPatterns.alternative: Always pass a visible label. If the design shows no visible label, add an aria-label to the input via ...rest and consult the design system owner.

purpose.any IconName: Renders a decorative icon on the leading (left) side. Use 'search' for search inputs. Icon is aria-hidden.

purpose.default: 40px tall. Standard form fields and inline inputs.
purpose.large: 48px tall. Hero search bars, prominent single-field forms.

purpose.square: Rounded-corner rectangle (border-radius-sm). Default for form fields.
purpose.round: Pill shape (border-radius-full). Use for search inputs or brand-forward contexts.

states.description: Brand-colour border to indicate the active field.
Error-colour border and a below-input error message. Set via the error prop.
Muted text and border; cursor not-allowed; interaction blocked natively.

ariaAttributes: aria-describedby (points to error message element when error prop is set)
aria-invalid (set to true when error prop is set)
